blocker: End-to-end GRPO A/B (v2 mixed vs v3 same-scenario learning curves) needs the live HUD Tinker trainer + a forked Qwen slug + ~30 min, over the ~15-min cap and infra/credit-gated; mechanism proven + runnable v3 driver shipped, live curve is the documented next step (no training numbers fabricated).
one_line: Implemented same-scenario GRPO group batching (3rd Table-1 fix) grounded in train_rft_v2.py:11-13 as additive artifacts (same_scenario_groups.py partition+advantage+variance module; train_rft_same_scenario.py v3 driver running one single-scenario Taskset per index so every trainer.step group is pure same-scenario; no core edits): same-scenario baselining deletes the between-scenario advantage variance Var(E[R|S]) by the law of total variance, and on stats grounded in v2's ~0.5 mean/~0.17 spread it cuts the advantage 2nd moment 2.38x (E[A^2] 0.0748->0.0314, between_var 0.0433 removed) and corrects the advantage SIGN on 28% of rollouts; 7/7 unit tests pass, total-variance identity exact (0.074762==0.074762), driver --help works HUD-free.
